---
title: ""
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    geometry: margin=1in
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=*, topsep=2pt, itemsep=1pt}
        \usepackage{parskip}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \titleformat{\section}
          {\large\bfseries}
          {}
          {0em}
          {}[\titlerule]
        \titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.0em}{0.4em}
---

{{< include cv-content.qmd >}}
